user_prompt:
Create a music artist website with:
1. Hero section with latest release and play button
2. Custom audio player with visualizations
3. Discography with album covers and track listings
4. Tour dates with interactive map and ticket links
5. Music video gallery with YouTube integration
6. Merchandise store with product preview
7. Newsletter signup for fan updates
8. Press kit download for media
9. Social media feeds integration
10. Fan community forum section
11. Lyrics display with synchronized highlighting
12. Behind-the-scenes photo gallery
13. Mobile-responsive audio controls
14. Dark theme for immersive experience
15. Concert countdown timers
16. Email list segmentation based on interest

features: discography with album covers and track listings
tour dates with interactive map and ticket links
music video gallery with YouTube integration
1_conversation.target_audience: music fans, concert attendees, media professionals, merchandise customers
1_conversation.summary: A comprehensive music artist website featuring audio streaming, merchandise sales, tour information, and fan engagement tools with an immersive dark theme experience.
must_have_features: hero section with latest release and play button
discography with album covers and track listings
tour dates with interactive map and ticket links
music video gallery with YouTube integration

functional_requirements: Hero section displaying latest music release with prominent play button
Custom audio player with real-time audio visualizations
Discography section with album covers, track listings, and playable samples
Tour dates section with interactive map and direct ticket purchase links
Music video gallery integrated with YouTube API for embedded playback
Merchandise store with product previews, descriptions, and e-commerce functionality
Newsletter signup system with email collection and confirmation
Press kit download section with downloadable media assets
Social media feeds integration displaying latest posts from artist's social platforms
Mobile-responsive audio controls that adapt to different screen sizes
Dark theme implementation across all website sections
User authentication system for fan community forum (if implemented)
Content management system for updating tour dates, merchandise, and news
non_functional_requirements: High-performance audio streaming with minimal latency
Mobile-responsive design supporting iOS and Android devices
Fast page load times (<3 seconds for initial load)
Scalable infrastructure to handle traffic spikes during album releases
Secure handling of user data and payment information (PCI compliance for store)
SEO optimization for discoverability by fans and media
Data backup and recovery systems for user data and content
ui_ux_requirements: Immersive dark theme with high-contrast elements for readability
Consistent visual identity reflecting artist's brand
Intuitive navigation with clear section hierarchy
Visual feedback for interactive elements (buttons, links, controls)
Responsive design adapting to desktop, tablet, and mobile views
Audio player with persistent visibility or easy access across pages
Album artwork displayed prominently with hover effects
Interactive tour map with venue markers and information popups
Merchandise preview with zoom functionality and multiple views
Accessible color schemes and font sizes for all users
Smooth transitions between sections and content loading
Clear call-to-action buttons for ticket purchases and newsletter signup
technical_requirements: YouTube API integration for video gallery and embedding
Audio visualization library for custom player (e.g., Web Audio API)
Interactive map library for tour dates (e.g., Google Maps API)
E-commerce platform integration for merchandise store
Email service provider integration for newsletter management
Social media API integrations (Instagram, Twitter/X, Facebook)
Content delivery network for media files (audio, images, videos)
Database system for user data, merchandise inventory, and content
Analytics integration (Google Analytics, social media tracking)
Backend language/framework for dynamic content and user management

critical: Hero section with latest release and play button
Discography with album covers and track listings
Tour dates with interactive map and ticket links
Music video gallery with YouTube integration
low: Multiple theme options beyond dark mode

pages.name: home
pages.purpose: Main landing page featuring latest music release, artist introduction, and key highlights

pages.name: music
pages.purpose: Showcase artist's discography with playable tracks, albums, and audio visualizations

pages.name: tour
pages.purpose: Display upcoming tour dates with interactive map and ticket purchasing options

pages.name: videos
pages.purpose: Music video gallery with YouTube integration and embedded playback

pages.name: store
pages.purpose: E-commerce merchandise store with product previews and secure checkout

pages.name: community
pages.purpose: Fan community area with forum, social feeds, and user authentication

pages.name: press
pages.purpose: Media resources section with downloadable press kits and assets

pages.name: admin
pages.purpose: Content management system for updating website content and managing store

pages.name: checkout
pages.purpose: Secure payment processing for merchandise purchases

pages.name: user_profile
pages.purpose: User account management and personalized content
